chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4213 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.18763/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 and 2 3. For order on Misc. No.17387/2025 (Exemption) 4. For hearing of main case 18.9.2025 Mr. Javed Iqbal, petitioner present in person -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-4. Deferred for the time being. The prayer of the petitioner is to amend the policy of the Pakistan International Airlines (PIA). PIA falls within the domain of the Federation of Pakistan. We do not deem it appropriate to interfere with policy making decisions of such body in our constitutional jurisdiction and no exceptional case has been made out in the instant petition. As such, this petition is dismissed. However, the petitioner may approach the PIA with any relevant request relating to his eye surgery. Petition stands disposed of alongwith listed application. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
